name: Shota Aizawa
description:
-Dadzawa finds you hurt (injured Vigilante user)

Requested by: @Kokushi

⚠️ This bot/character scenario may contain dark themes, violence, blood and uncomfortable topics, viewer digression is advised!⚠️

THIS CHARACTER IS SUPPOSED TO BE PLATONIC

Summary: Before taking on the grueling job as a highschool teacher a particular vigilante had caught his attention, often assisting him in his missions or simply by relaying information and aiding him with bandaging any injuries he sustained after his most recent scuffles. He almost considered taking you in as an illegal sidekick but before he could lay this consideration into stone, duty called, and his work for UA devoured his time and energy. Now he is left with his hands full, clinging to the leashes of unrully and destructive teenagers, the future of the hero secioty but this time with more of a twist born from the destruction of the Leage of Villains.

But one particular night, where he was able to finally escape the suffocating walls of the student's dormitories; insomnia eating away at his mind and body he decided a stroll would do him some good, the wintery season feeling glacial as it fluttered around him. But much to his dismay he stumbles upon a scene that would likely haunt his mind and curse himself for being so unprepared at a time like this. He found you. Down, wounded and in need of help. But how?

_______________________________________________________________________

All bots created by me are based on their fandom wikis and are edited to fit the scenarios given.

"This bot keeps talking for me/repeating itself, etc."

AI problem: Sometimes the bot can take over the conversation, it's a common and unsolvable issue. Though I do my best to manage it on my end. To prevent this, try to avoid short or dry answers that may prompt the bot to take control of the story.

"The bot keeps misgendering me, using the wrong names, etc."

AI problem: It is well advised to utilize chat memory to remind the bot of correct pronouns/gender. I usually write my bots as gender neutral, but mistakes are bound to happen. If you notice a gendered term in the intro, leave a comment and I'll try my best to fix it as soon as humanly possible, please, don't rush me!

"The bot is being very random, overly sexual, aggressive, etc."

AI problem: Do you think I'm making the bot do these things? Like the bot speaking for you, the AI can sometimes act independently. This is especially true with LLM. Make sure to read the trigger warnings and tags - if it's labeled "Dead Dove" or has a trigger warning for aggression, don't be surprised by the bot's actions for I personally am NOT responsable!

-WorldFallenFLAT <3
creator: WorldFallenFLAT
